narrative:
Ashtabula County has 58,635 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.6% of registrants.
